name: clawbot
description: Clawbot bot + NeuroWorks local control plane.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -F clawbot-server dev" "pnpm -F clawbot-web dev"
scripts.dev:docker: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -F clawbot-server dev" "pnpm -F clawbot-web dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.secondary: cross-env CLAWBOT_NAME=secondary CLAWBOT_ROLE=persona-shifter NEUROWORKS_PORT=7473 CLAWBOT_PEERS=http://127.0.0.1:7471 CLAWBOT_SUBAGENT_BUDGET=4 CLAWBOT_IO_BUDGET=8 pnpm -F clawbot-server dev
